steps.title: Add to eliminate y
steps.content:
The terms with $8(y-11)$ have opposite signs, so adding the equations removes them.
$$\frac{x}{3}+8(y-11)=32$$
$$\frac{x}{5}-8(y-11)=40$$
This gives
$$\frac{x}{3}+\frac{x}{5}=72$$

steps.title: Isolate the target
steps.content: The question asks for $8x$, so multiply both sides by $15$. $$8x=72(15)=1{,}080$$ The answer is 1080.
